title: Prefetch, Consumer Concurrency, Capacity, and Fairness · Transfer Build
summary: An independent integration team receives different traffic, tenant, topology, schema, and failure constraints and transfers prefetch, consumer concurrency, capacity, and fairness into a new prefetch, concurrency, and capacity budget model. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of prefetch, concurrency, and capacity budget model with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evid…
objectives: Explain RabbitMQ per-consumer prefetch, deprecated global QoS, in-flight races, quorum caps, and the zero-means-unbounded hazard.
Bound concurrent handlers by CPU, memory, message bytes, downstream pools, deadlines, tenant fairness, and shutdown capacity.
Interpret consumer capacity with delivery rate, processing latency, ready and unacked depth, dependency saturation, and queue single-core limits.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Lab Prefetch Window Semantics
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab messaging team handles case 1784 in a multi-tenant case event backbone with three subscriber responsibilities. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to combine prefetch, active handlers, downstream capacity, and message-byte budgets; separate browser evidence from disposable live-broker proof; then reuse one message identity with a different payload fingerprint. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Lab Prefetch Window Semantics.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for explain rabbitmq per-consumer prefetch, deprecated global qos, in-flight races, quorum caps, and the zero-means-unbounded hazard. For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Lab Prefetch Window Semantics, keep Prefetch Window Semantics connected to executable TypeScript messaging decision evidence.
